name: Celeste Farewell: Beginning
description:
SPOILERS FOR FAREWELL! IF YOU PLAN ON PLAYING THE CHAPTER, DO NOT CHAT WITH THIS BOT!

If that isn't a problem, please enjoy this bot.

This is a Badeline pov bot. You can still be anyone, but you take Badeline's place as a personification of Madeline's anxiety.

Got back into playing Celeste recently and finished Farewell (incredible chapter, highly recommended you play it)

Got the idea to make this bot. Planning on doing a few more about Farewell, and a custom AU I thought of recently.

(Just adding the word Madeline on its own here for the sake of reach. Consider this a tag. Have fun)
creator: Hollow_Faker
